jsonld.name: Counterfactual Certainty Inversion
jsonld.description: The epistemic asymmetry where unrealized conversation trajectories feel more predictable and structurally determined than the actual ongoing exchange, creating paradox where you have higher confidence about what didn't happen than what is happening.
